message:
style(tui): upgrade footer hint separators to box-drawing │ with distinct styling

Replace ASCII pipe ` | ` with box-drawing vertical ` │ ` (U+2502) in
command hint separators for main/graph/history footer lines.  Apply
distinct footer_key(), footer_hint(), footer_sep() token styles so keys
stand out from descriptions and separators read as lighter chrome.

Update 18 snapshot files and 2 inline unit tests to match the new
separator character.  Also roll forward score drift (0.692 → 0.691) in
6 insight/actionable snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
